subcodes.first_line: Blessed be thy deed, O thou who hast attained mention before the Wronged One in His mighty imprisonment, and from Whom was perceived the fragrance of thy love for God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله عملک یا من فزت بذکر قبل لدی المظلوم فی سجنه العظیم و وجد منه عرف حبک لله
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
